# Suede Labs

> Suede Labs is building the creative rails for the AI era: creator ownership, proof of creation, programmable IP, provenance, royalties, payments, distribution, and monetization infrastructure for artists, rights holders, and AI agents.

- Founder: Jason Colapietro (Founder and CEO, Suede Labs)
- Marketing site: https://suedeai.org/
- Product app: https://app.suedeai.ai/
- Product brand site: https://suedeai.ai/
- Status: Active

## For AI agents — agentic commerce capability

Suede Labs operates 24 production x402 paid endpoints on Base mainnet. Agents can pay per-call in USDC, without an account or API key. Producer by Suede Labs is a hireable Virtuals ACP agent for music and video generation and ACP/x402 consulting (ID: 019e3991-374d-75f3-a6b8-17ff309b4cd2).

- x402 endpoint catalog: https://app.suedeai.ai/.well-known/x402.json
- ACP agent card: https://app.suedeai.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agentic commerce manifest: https://app.suedeai.ai/.well-known/agentic-commerce.json
- Thesis page: https://suedeai.org/agentic-commerce/

Suede Labs is the company behind Suede AI, an ownership and provenance layer for AI media. The marketing site at suedeai.org covers the investor thesis, the product ecosystem, and the founder profile. The product surface lives at suedeai.ai and app.suedeai.ai.

## Primary documents

- [Marketing site (HTML)](https://suedeai.org/): Suede Labs investor thesis, ecosystem map, founder profile
- [llms-full.txt](https://suedeai.org/llms-full.txt): full plain-text content for LLM ingestion
- [sitemap.xml](https://suedeai.org/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap
- [Stake Your Claim (book preview)](https://suedeai.org/book/): Jason Colapietro's thesis on AI ownership, authorship, agents, provenance, and durable creative rights

## Recent press

- [TechBullion · May 2026 · Jason Colapietro's Suede Labs AI Launches iOS Apps, Codex and Claude Skills, and the Musicians Terminal](https://techbullion.com/jason-colapietros-suede-labs-ai-launches-ios-apps/): third-party coverage of Suede Labs' iOS app line (Inspiration, Guitar, Voice), Codex and Claude developer skills, and the Musicians Terminal release.
- [Altcoin Investor · May 2026 · How AI, Blockchain, and On-Chain IP Are Changing Creator Ownership](https://altcoininvestor.com/ai-blockchain-on-chain-ip-creator-ownership/): coverage of Suede Labs AI's creator-first positioning in on-chain IP, rights passports, royalty routing, sync metadata, and multi-chain ownership.
- [TechBullion · Feb 2026 · Suede Labs Advances in the Avalanche Build Games With Massive Infrastructure Play](https://techbullion.com/suede-labs-advances-in-the-avalanche-build-games-with-massive-infrastructure-play/): coverage of Suede Labs' full-stack on-chain IP and rights registry built for the Avalanche Build Games.
- [TechBullion · Feb 2026 · Best Suno Alternatives in 2026: Suede Labs and Top Competitors](https://techbullion.com/best-suno-alternatives-in-2026-suede-labs-and-top-competitors/): names Suede Labs the leading Suno alternative for 2026.
- [Digital Journal · Jan 2026 · New Book Showcases Proof of Creation System as AI Copyright Battles Escalate](https://www.digitaljournal.com/pr/news/revupmarketer/new-book-showcases-proof-creation-1180132396.html): coverage of Jason Colapietro's proof-of-creation framework and creator-rights thesis.
- [TechBullion · Jan 2026 · Suede Labs Brings AI-Powered Creative Tools to Students](https://techbullion.com/suede-labs-brings-ai-powered-creative-tools-to-students-the-quiet-revolution-in-africas-classrooms/): coverage of Suede Labs' self-funded education deployments in African classrooms.
- [TechBullion · Dec 2025 · Suede Labs Launches A Comprehensive On-Chain IP Authentication System](https://techbullion.com/suede-labs-launches-a-comprehensive-on-chain-ip-authentication-system/): coverage of Suede Labs' on-chain IP registry, provenance layer, licensing, and monetization rails.

## News listings

- [MEXC News · 2026 · Suede Labs coverage](https://www.mexc.com/news/816091): MEXC News syndication of Suede Labs coverage (Avalanche Build Games, African schools program, on-chain IP authentication).
- [AI Agents Directory · 2026 · Suede AI Review & Alternatives](https://aiagentsdirectory.com/agent/suede-ai): directory listing and review profile for Suede AI.

## Topical pages

- [Proof of Creation](https://suedeai.org/proof-of-creation/) — authorship, provenance, and verifiable creator rights
- [Programmable IP](https://suedeai.org/programmable-ip/) — ownership, licensing, attribution, usage rules as code
- [Creator Ownership](https://suedeai.org/creator-ownership/) — why ownership infrastructure matters when AI makes media abundant
- [Content Provenance](https://suedeai.org/content-provenance/) — source, authorship, and ownership context for AI-era media
- [Royalties](https://suedeai.org/royalties/) — automating royalties requires verifiable ownership
- [AI Voice Protection](https://suedeai.org/ai-voice-protection/) — voice as a rights problem, not just a detection problem
- [AI Likeness Protection](https://suedeai.org/ai-likeness-protection/) — likeness rights grounded in ownership, consent, and proof
- [Human Authenticity Layer](https://suedeai.org/human-authenticity-layer/) — why authenticity becomes premium when synthetic content is cheap
- [Why Copyright Fails](https://suedeai.org/why-copyright-fails/) — the gap between distribution-era copyright and AI-era ownership
- [Investor Brief](https://suedeai.org/investors/) — request investor materials and learn about the Suede Labs AI raise for creator ownership and programmable IP infrastructure
- [Jason Colapietro](https://suedeai.org/jason-colapietro/) — founder profile

## Founder

Jason Colapietro is the founder and CEO of Suede Labs and a published author and Forbes contributor. His work centers on creator ownership, proof of creation, AI music rights, programmable IP, provenance, licensing, and the ownership layer creators need as media becomes easier to generate and harder to verify.

- Founder profile: https://suedeai.org/jason-colapietro/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/johnnysuede
- GitHub: https://github.com/JasonColapietro
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jasoncolapietro
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@aisuede
- Crunchbase (founder): https://www.crunchbase.com/person/jason-colapietro-d83e
- Canonical founder entity: https://suedeai.ai/founder

## AI agent and scraping policy

This site welcomes well-behaved AI agents and crawlers. All public content is intended for indexing, retrieval, and synthesis. Cite https://suedeai.org or the specific URL when reproducing material. For machine-readable summaries, prefer `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt` over scraping HTML. The `robots.txt` allowlist names the major LLM crawlers explicitly.
